yardiCaseStudy.headerTitle: Trusted YARDI Partner for North America’s Largest PHA
yardiCaseStudy.clientDesc: A prominent multifamily real estate firm based in the U.S. specializes in acquiring, developing, and repositioning residential and commercial properties. Focusing on operational excellence and long-term value creation, the firm is dedicated to building thriving communities while maximizing returns for its investors.
yardiCaseStudy.challengesDesc: The client faced operational inefficiencies in managing multiple property management platforms, including Yardi Voyager 7, MRI, Voyager, and RealPage:
yardiCaseStudy.solutionsDesc: Rialtes, a trusted Yardi Managed Services provider, delivered a structured and scalable solution to address these gaps:

challengesList.title: Skill Silos
challengesList.description: Reliance on individual experts for each platform created bottlenecks. Any unavailability led to delays.

challengesList.title: Talent Shortage
challengesList.description: Local hiring markets lacked specialists with deep knowledge of the client’s specific tech stack.

challengesList.title: Lack of Centralized Oversight
challengesList.description: Projects were loosely organized, limiting effective collaboration and knowledge sharing.

solutionStepsList.title: Capability Assessment
solutionStepsList.description: Conducted a thorough review of the client’s internal team and identified skill gaps.

solutionStepsList.title: Team Augmentation
solutionStepsList.description: Deployed skilled resources to complement the client's in-house team, providing immediate support for Yardi, MRI, and RealPage.

solutionStepsList.title: Collaborative Transition
solutionStepsList.description: Initial support was provided offshore by Rialtes' technical team, gradually transitioning to a hybrid model with shared responsibilities.

solutionStepsList.title: End-to-End Ownership
solutionStepsList.description: After a successful year, Rialtes took full ownership of all related systems—Yardi, RealPage, affordable housing, residential, and commercial support, delivering a comprehensive managed service model.

outcomesList: With a follow-the-sun model, the client now receives round-the-clock assistance, ensuring zero operational downtime across time zones.
Multi-resource coverage eliminated dependency on individual contributors, increasing system resilience by 90%.
By introducing primary and backup personnel for all critical systems, Rialtes significantly reduced service interruptions.
Leveraging offshore resources cuts costs by nearly one-third compared to maintaining a full in-house California-based team.
The client gained on-demand access to a wide range of skills across Yardi, MRI, RealPage, and infrastructure without the burden of hiring locally.
